red_on_starting_head.head: a573504
red_on_starting_head.primary_test_panic_substring: parsed.protocol_version was None despite protocolVersion="2024-11-05" being sent in JSON
red_on_starting_head.negative_control_test_panic_substring: the legacy snake_case key protocol_version must no longer bind to InitializeParams.protocol_version, got: Some("2024-11-05")
red_on_starting_head.supplementary_test_explanation: handler at server.rs:120-145 tolerantly swallows None via .and_then(|p| from_value(p).ok()) — initialize succeeds while internally degrading; this is the silent-loss bug surface

fix.shape: added #[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")] to InitializeParams struct + expanded module docstring
fix.rationale_choice: struct-level rename_all over per-field rename: covers both fields in one attribute, future-proof against new fields silently regressing

coordination.disjoint_from_m6: M6 touches crates/tldr-daemon/src/handlers/*; M7 touches crates/tldr-mcp/src/protocol.rs. Zero file overlap.
coordination.m4_response_side_intact: InitializeResult #[serde(rename = ...)] attributes unchanged (M4 territory not modified).
coordination.m3_jsonrpcrequest_intact: JsonRpcRequest.id Option<Value> shape unchanged (M3 territory not modified).
coordination.no_cargo_or_changelog_changes: version + CHANGELOG updates deferred to M8.
